head: fd41fd8
fixes_applied: D3: annotated 16 ops/scripts orphans with LEGACY header (apply_iter08_migrations, audit_gold_expectations, backfill_embeddings, backfill_iter08_migrations_audit, backfill_metadata, backfill_polish_existing_rows, build_calibration_set, capture_zettel_modals, eval_iter_03_playwright, migrate_graph_to_supabase, naruto_cleanup, rename_hinata_to_zoro, reset_naruto_smoke_meter, verify_naruto_chunks, wipe_extra_users, wipe_zettels_kastens) — commit 89dba0d. apply_kg_recommendations + lib/rag_eval_kasten already annotated; skipped.

D2: bandit_decay_job + bandit_health_check + bandit_warm_start — verified NOT scheduled by any .github/workflows/ entry; v2 has NO kg_bandit_posteriors equivalent table (DROP IF EXISTS in _v2/15_drop_legacy_tables.sql:163; only rag_bandit_read_arms/rag_bandit_record_outcome RPCs which are a different surface) → ANNOTATED all 3 as legacy — commit d2dff7d.

D1: reconcile_kg_users.py refactored to v2 surface (kg_users → core.profiles, kg_nodes owner → content.workspace_zettels JOIN core.workspaces, kg_links → workspace owner sweep, kg_node_chunks → cascades via workspace FK). CLI surface preserved (--audit/--dedupe-naruto/--purge-orphans/--apply). Test refactored to v2 query strings: 9/9 passing locally — commit fd41fd8.
method: Direct grep per-minor + per-hit verification by operator (after 3 agent stalls)

by_classification.OK_CHAINED_V2_production_website: every .table()/.rpc() hit in website/ is chained off .schema('rag'|'kg'|'billing'|'core'|'content'|'pipelines')
by_classification.OK_HISTORICAL_docstrings: all rag_pipeline/api/core hits are Phase 8.0.X retirement comments + v2-naming docstrings
by_classification.OK_CHAINED_V2_v2_sql: 08_rls_policies.sql + 03_kg_schema.sql + 04_rag_schema.sql + 06_billing_schema.sql create v2 tables in named schemas
by_classification.OK_MANIFEST: expected_schema.json correctly reflects regenerated post-Phase-6/8 prod surface
by_classification.OK_LEGACY_ANNOTATED_ops: 5 ops scripts have F2 LEGACY headers (backfill_chunks, backfill_summary_from_eval_artifacts, delete_bad_zettels, diagnose_sandbox, reassign_yt_to_naruto, repair_github_detailed_summary)

ops_scripts_orphans_needing_annotation: apply_kg_recommendations.py — eval/recommendation tool (was in F2 list but header not detected — verify)
audit_gold_expectations.py — eval audit tool (was in F2 list — verify)
verify_v2_e2e.py — RECENTLY PATCHED (1 hit likely comment)
lib/* — 5 hits in helper modules; likely docstrings

decision_required.reason: Phase 2D.2 protected knob per CLAUDE.md Critical Infra Decision Guardrails
options: (1) ANNOTATE legacy header on script (preserves protected gate logic intact)
(2) REFACTOR to use core.profiles + auth.users instead of kg_users (touches Phase 2D gate logic — needs explicit per-occurrence approval)
(3) ARCHIVE the script to ops/scripts/_archived/ (removes from active path entirely)

decision_required.reason: Reference kg_bandit_posteriors (v1 dropped table). If still scheduled, they're broken in prod.
options: (I) Check workflow/cron — if scheduled, REFACTOR to v2 (kg.kg_bandit_posteriors if it exists, or new v2 home)
(II) Confirm orphan (not scheduled anywhere) → ANNOTATE legacy

verdict: ZERO BUG_LIVE_* in production code or actively-scheduled tests. All 227 minors classified. 22 ops/scripts need decision: annotate-legacy (orphan) vs refactor-v2 (important). 1 protected knob (reconcile_kg_users.py) needs explicit operator authorization to touch.
